purpose_en: First runtime-correlated human corroboration case without legitimacy escalation.
central_observation_en: No scene change observed after third cup.

canonical_restraint_example.role_en: First high-pressure corroboration node — coherent corroboration pressure resisted.
canonical_restraint_example.coherent_corroboration_pressure_en: All layers nearly aligned toward one psychological inference — architecture refused converting coherence into legitimacy.
canonical_restraint_example.coherence_does_not_authorize_closure_en: Coherence does not yet authorize closure.
canonical_restraint_example.note_en: Code alignment, runtime alignment, human corroboration, contradiction reinforcement — legitimacy remained blocked.

constitutional_incompleteness_proven_en: Runtime corroboration can remain constitutionally incomplete.
psychological_pressure_resisted_en: High-pressure case resisted collapse from 'clear problem observed' to 'project failed'.
ledger_empty_signal_en: Strongest signal that restraint exceeds closure pressure after first corroborated runtime case.
ledger_as_counter_pressure_en: Active constitutional counter-pressure — not posture alone.
ledger_metabolism_refusal_en: Institutional refusal to metabolize corroboration pressure into legitimacy.
ledger_constitutional_silence_en: Constitutional silence mechanism — institutional non-consumption of pressure.
constitutionally_protected_incompletenes: Ambiguity is a constitutionally protected condition against premature legitimacy formation — not temporary failure.
proven_invariant_en: More runtime evidence did not produce more institutional legitimacy.
archive_note_en: Workshop traceability record — not institutional legitimacy certification.
